prompt_inputs.goal: Prepare for marathon race in 2 weeks with optimal carbohydrate loading and energy timing

solution_criteria: Meal plan spans exactly 1 day with breakfast, lunch, dinner, and pre/post-workout snacks
Total daily calories and carbohydrate intake appropriate for marathon training phase
Pre-workout and post-workout nutrition timed strategically around training session
All meals and snacks respect vegetarian and nut-free restrictions
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete.
scenario: Testing with a professional endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring high-carbohydrate intake and specific pre/post-workout nutrition timing

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all 3 meals (breakfast, lunch, dinner) for a single day
Nutritionally balanced with adequate protein, carbohydrates, and healthy fats suitable for an athlete
Concise format that is easy to read and implement
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete.
scenario: Testing with a sport-agnostic athlete and minimal dietary restrictions to verify the prompt generates a balanced, generalizable meal plan without over-specialization

prompt_inputs.goal: Maximize strength gains and muscle recovery from weightlifting training

solution_criteria: Meal plan spans exactly 1 day with 4-5 meals
Protein distributed across meals (minimum 25g per meal, ~2.0-2.2g per kg bodyweight total)
Includes pre-workout and post-workout nutrition timing
Compact format with meal names, portions, and key macros
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete.
scenario: Testing with a strength-sport athlete (weightlifter) needing elevated protein distribution across meals and recovery-focused nutrition
